value.found_quote: By integrating Google ADK with Weave, you can track and analyze your agent's performance and behavior using OpenTelemetry (OTEL) traces.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes W&B Weave observability for ADK as a supported integration ("Supported in ADKPython"), detailing how Google ADK integrates with W&B Weave to log, track, and visualize agent runs via OpenTelemetry traces. The page provides full setup instructions, code examples, and dashboard visualization guidance, confirming the claim in its entirety.
